title: Dendrobium aloifolium
taxonomy: Dendrobium aloifolium is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Guinea. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. Dendrobium aloifolium is further classified as a genus within the subfamily Orchidoideae, and its classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Magnoliophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Subfamily: Orchidoideae, Tribe: Dendrobieae, Genus: Dendrobium, Species: D. aloifolium. This classification reflects the plant's complex evolutionary history and its position within the orchid family. The precise classification of Dendrobium aloifolium helps scientists understand its relationships with other species and its unique characteristics.
